title: Wholesome Midnight Craving Grapes Cedar-Plank Pilaf
description: A winey, bouncy-qq midnight-craving Norwegian dish featuring grapes, blanched and seasoned with aromatic herbs for a delightful vegetarian-friendly snack.
instructions: Spread a thin layer of olive oil on one side of the cedar plank. Season with red pepper flakes, basil leaves, thyme sprigs, salt, and minced garlic cloves evenly over both sides.
Place the planks in the oven for 10 minutes, then remove and add more olive oil as needed to prevent sticking.
Transfer the grapes onto the prepared side of the cedar plank. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until heated through and bouncy-qq.
Remove from oven and serve hot.
